Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a crowd forming in[n]front of the bulletin board...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I'll take a peek before[n]going to the faculty office...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll head to the entrance[n]of the Velvet Room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We should try gathering information[n]at the outskirts of the station...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to the faculty office...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...My whole body feels sluggish. I'm[n]too exhausted to fight the fatigue.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head to bed early tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2002 0 0}Should we also take a look around the school, while we're at it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll just follow you around. If you want to leave, head for the front entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are plans for a celebration[n]to be held tonight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2025 0 0}Well, I was just headed there myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know the place, right? Let's go.[n]{f 1 1}
